name: Cold Peanut Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti in boiling water according to package directions. Drain.
2. Whisk together sesame oil, garlic, ginger root, peanut butter, soy sauce, vinegar, and lemon juice.
3. Mix dressing with hot cooked pasta.
4. Add scallions, radishes, and cucumber; mix gently.
5. Chill in the refrigerator for several hours, covered, before serving.
Total calories per serving: 312
Fat: 10 g
